# GPUWeb CTS invalid WGSL cases that the current pinned Naga oracle accepts.
# These remain extracted and tracked so changes in either Naga or moon_wgsl cannot
# silently move cases into or out of this category.
src_webgpu_shader_validation_decl_override_spec_ts_001_f38e4979a46c
src_webgpu_shader_validation_extension_dual_source_blending_spec_ts_001_c889d639eeec
src_webgpu_shader_validation_extension_dual_source_blending_spec_ts_002_7979a6b5a99a
src_webgpu_shader_validation_extension_dual_source_blending_spec_ts_003_97559793a6b2
src_webgpu_shader_validation_extension_dual_source_blending_spec_ts_005_624a38d07672
src_webgpu_shader_validation_extension_dual_source_blending_spec_ts_006_92a2ceea30a8
src_webgpu_shader_validation_extension_dual_source_blending_spec_ts_007_684656af783b
src_webgpu_shader_validation_parse_enable_spec_ts_001_7837888b191d
src_webgpu_shader_validation_parse_enable_spec_ts_002_862610192830
src_webgpu_shader_validation_parse_must_use_spec_ts_001_db472cd52d3d
src_webgpu_shader_validation_parse_must_use_spec_ts_002_9dbd22780f5f
